stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are making an approach to Den Helder airport EHKD. The wind is 040/10. ATC clears you to land on Helipad 1 instead of the designated runway, and this will result in a crosswind. Which of the following is the most probable cause for this instruction?

options.c: There is a thunderstorm approaching the field from the north
options.d: Reduced visibility at the far end of Runway 03
